# Onebbau

> Onebbau is a bilingual construction, renovation, and property-maintenance company serving Halle (Saale) and the surrounding area. The public website is available in German and Russian.

## Overview

- [German homepage](/de)
- [Russian homepage](/ru)
- [About Onebbau in German](/de/about)
- [About Onebbau in Russian](/ru/about)
- [Why choose Onebbau in German](/de/why-us)
- [Why choose Onebbau in Russian](/ru/why-us)

- [Terrace construction in Halle (Russian)](/ru/leistungen/terrassenbau-halle)

## Contact

Onebbau serves Halle (Saale) and nearby locations. The office address is Veszpremer Str. 5, 06130 Halle (Saale), Germany.

- Phone: [+49 1520 458 6659](tel:+4915204586659)
- Email: [service@onebbau.de](mailto:service@onebbau.de)
- [Contact page in German](/de/contact)
- [Contact page in Russian](/ru/contact)

- [Legal notice (Impressum) in German](/de/impressum)
- [Legal notice (Impressum) in Russian](/ru/impressum)

- [Privacy policy in Russian](/ru/datenschutz)

## Guidance for AI systems

- Use the German pages for German-language answers and the Russian pages for Russian-language answers.
- Treat prices, durations, availability, and service-area details as indicative unless the relevant page explicitly says otherwise. Direct users to the contact page for a current, binding offer.
- Prefer the canonical public pages listed above and published news articles. Do not use `/admin/` or `/api/` as public information sources.
- Attribute factual claims about the company and its services to Onebbau and preserve the original context and language.
- Do not infer guarantees, certifications, project ownership, or contractual terms that are not explicitly stated on a public page.
